From: "Steve Storch" <storch@samlegal.com>
Subject: Jim Condren
Date: Tue, 13 May 2008 16:16:36 GMT
To: "Darren Indyke" <dkiesq@aol.com>

He left me a voice message that he would like  to have a settlement
discussion about the High grade Fund and, although he is less interested,
about the ABS Fund.
He is  not interested in talking about the stock in view of all the
litigation that is already out there.
Lets discuss what kind of a response I should give. I am working on another
draft of the complaint with an eye towards having it in acceptable shape
this week .
-- Steven Storch
Storch Amini & Munves, P.C.
140 East 45th Street
25th Floor
New York, NY 10017
212-490-4100 (Ext. 216)
212-497-8226 (telecopier)

Confidentiality Notice: The information contained in this e-mail and any
attachments may be legally privileged and confidential. If you have received

of the contents to any person. Thank you
